reason: Alytaus Kolegija was reorganised into the Alytus Faculty of Kauno Kolegija HEI on 1 July 2024 and no longer exists as an independent university. The nursing programme taught in Alytus is Lithuanian-medium only (confirmed by the official AIKOS government registry: studying language 'lithuanian'). The English-medium 'General Practice Nursing' Bachelor's programme that international/Indian applicants would actually enrol in is delivered in Kaunas at Kauno Kolegija's Faculty of Medicine, not in Alytus. Publishing a page framed as 'Alytaus Kolegija - General Practice Nursing' for an India audience would misrepresent either the language of instruction or the actual study location, which the sourcing rules prohibit. See the accompanying .md file for full detail, all corroborated facts, and sources.
